_schema_note: Human review of MarkItDown output (markitdown 0.1.6) on the same 28 asset ids that were the intersection of AksharaMD Phase 1 and PyMuPDF4LLM. Each verdict is on MarkItDown's OWN text_content, not either of the other tools'. Enum: usable | usable_with_minor_defects | materially_damaged | unusable. Evidence cites observed extraction quality; the 29th entry (unreadablemetadata.pdf) is retained as supplementary because MarkItDown parses it where PyMuPDF4LLM raises.

parsebench/3colpres.evidence: 4191 chars but each word is line-broken with heavy whitespace ('A Message from the President / Dear / Members, / I write in an / effort to share'). Reading order is fragmented; content is present but visibly damaged.

parsebench/elpais.evidence: 6724 chars but rendered as broken table syntax with columns like '| EL | PERIÓDICO |'; Spanish accents preserved (PERIÓDICO, ESPAÑOL, SÁBADO). Reading order corrupted by table-syntax reconstruction.

parsebench/simple2.evidence: 4646 chars but heavily fragmented: 'It / follows / (2015/1017). / the European Fund / This report presents the results of the' — words split across lines. Content present but ordering severely corrupted.

parsebench/2colmercedes.evidence:
3725 chars; German audit-report body extracted with hyphenation preserved as line breaks ('pro-
vision'). Section headings preserved.

parsebench/battery.evidence: 2394 chars; safety-warning content extracted with lettered list (a/b/c) preserved. Same quality as PyMuPDF4LLM.

parsebench/eastbaytimes.evidence: Single-column news article extracted cleanly; body preserved.

parsebench/strikeUnderline.evidence: 7434 chars but TOC entries have concatenated page numbers ('103101' = '10' + '3101'). Strikethrough markup is NOT preserved as markdown syntax (unlike PyMuPDF4LLM). Content readable but structurally damaged.

parsebench/text_dense__de.evidence: German dense-text extracted; layout not fully verified at review DPI; typical MarkItDown quality on European text.

parsebench/letter3.evidence: **0 chars extracted** — MarkItDown has no OCR; image-only UK Home Office letter produces empty output. Same failure mode as PyMuPDF4LLM; AksharaMD Marker delivered 2353 chars.

parsebench/myctophidae.evidence: **0 chars extracted** — no OCR; scientific-taxonomy image plate produces empty output.

parsebench/japanese_case.evidence: **0 chars extracted** — no OCR; Japanese magazine image produces empty output.

parsebench/ikea3.evidence: 7024 chars, cleaner than PyMuPDF4LLM's extraction of this asset but still shows magazine-layout interleaving. TOC-like content readable; body sections fragmented.

public/001-trivial/minimal-document.pdf.evidence: 598 chars; Lorem Ipsum body extracted with line-break at column width but content complete. Same as PyMuPDF4LLM.

public/004-pdflatex-4-pages/pdflatex-4-p.evidence: Multi-page LaTeX doc extracted with content per page preserved.

public/026-latex-multicolumn/multicolumn.evidence: 13201 chars but rendered as broken markdown table syntax ('| Two-Column | | | | Document | with | Lorem'). Content present but not readable as normal prose; table reconstruction misfires on the two-column layout.

public/003-pdflatex-image/pdflatex-image.evidence: Image caption text extracted; image not rendered as placeholder (MarkItDown emits fewer image tokens than PyMuPDF4LLM).

public/007-imagemagick-images/imagemagic.evidence: **53 chars** — 'Background' repeated 4 times, no other content. No OCR; content lost.
**0 chars** — single image page; no OCR.
**0 chars** — single image page; no OCR.
**0 chars** — single image page; no OCR.

public/018-base64-image/base64image.pdf.evidence: Caption text extracted; image reference stripped.

public/028-image-references-deduplicatio.evidence: Multi-page image references PDF; small text extracted, most content lost.

public/015-arabic/habibi.pdf.evidence: 22 chars: 'حَبيبي habibi حَبيبي'. Arabic script preserved but reading order not verified; near-empty output. Similar degradation to PyMuPDF4LLM.

public/017-unreadable-meta-data/unreadab.evidence: 2521 chars; extracts datasheet content ('Rotary Potentiometer', 'Electrocomponents Industrial'). **MarkItDown parses this file where PyMuPDF4LLM raises IndexError.** Content structured as table but readable. Supplementary review — outside primary matched set.

public/010-pdflatex-forms/pdflatex-forms.evidence: 24 chars — only form labels 'Name / Check / Submit / 1'. Static text lost.

public/012-libreoffice-form/libreoffice-.evidence: 120 chars — sparse content; form structure lost.
